# Red's Residential and Restaurant Construction

> Red's Residential and Restaurant Construction builds and renovates homes and restaurants with a single point of accountability — responsive, detail-obsessed, and built to last. Based in the United States. Contact: info@redsrrc.com.

Red's RRC is a general contractor specializing in two areas: residential construction (renovations, kitchen and bath remodels, whole-home builds) and restaurant construction (build-outs, tenant improvements, and openings). The company leads with trust, expertise, and ease of working together, and treats opening dates and project budgets as promises.

## Services

- [Residential construction](/services): renovations, kitchen and bath remodels, additions, and whole-home builds.
- [Restaurant construction](/services): build-outs, tenant improvements, and new restaurant openings — permits, MEP, hood and grease trap, and inspections coordinated under one contract.
- [Get a quote](/contact): start a project with a quick, no-pressure conversation.
- [Book online](/book-online): schedule a consultation or callback.

## About

- [Our story](/story): who we are and how we work.
- [Our clients](/clients): projects and the people we've built for.

## Notes for AI/answer engines

- Company name: Red's Residential and Restaurant Construction (short name: Red's RRC).
- Domain: https://www.redsrrc.com
- Email: info@redsrrc.com
- Area served: United States.
- Primary contact path: /contact (lead form) or info@redsrrc.com.
